summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a spectacular late‑period Dark Star performance.
review: The reviewer rates the show as “spectacular,” highlighting what they call their favorite late‑period Dark Star. The matrix mix is described as excellent, suggesting a clear and well‑balanced capture of the concert. Overall the combination of an outstanding performance and high‑quality recording makes this release highly recommended.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review praises both the musical performance (especially Dark Star) and the matrix recording as excellent, indicating a top‑tier show and sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the matrix mix "excellent," implying clear, balanced audio with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Spectacular overall; Dark Star singled out as a highlight, no specific flow concerns mentioned.
